text: Eating a balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, like walking or cycling, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. Don’t forget mental health: take short breaks, practice deep breathing, or talk to a friend when you feel stressed. Finally, maintain a healthy work-life balance by setting clear boundaries between job tasks and personal time. Simple habits like these can greatly improve your overall well-being.
